summary: The user is planning a road trip to the mountains in June and is focused on ensuring their bike is in good condition. They recalled their last bike service on April 20th, which included a chain replacement and new bike lights, and are tracking their mileage with a goal of reaching 1000 miles by the end of summer. The user is also exploring new bike routes for their daily commutes and prioritizing safety with a Bell Zephyr helmet and bright bike lights.
facts: The user plans a road trip to the mountains in June.
The user last had their bike serviced on April 20th, where the mechanic replaced the chain for $25 and installed new bike lights for $40.
The user has clocked 347 miles on their bike since the start of the year and aims to reach 1000 miles by the end of summer.
The user commutes to work on their bike, which is about a 10-mile round trip.
The user purchased a Bell Zephyr helmet from a local bike shop downtown on April 10th.
The user installed new bike lights during their bike tune-up on April 20th.
The user is considering planning a longer ride this weekend and is checking their bike's condition.
The user is tracking their bike mileage and has set a goal to reach 1000 miles by the end of summer.
